title: micromeria lepida var. fernandezii
intro: Micromeria lepida var. fernandezii, also known as Canary Islands pennyroyal or Canary Island mint, is a subspecies of Micromeria lepida, a flowering plant in the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to act as a carminative, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful for treating digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Micromeria lepida var. fernandezii include its potential to relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used internally or applied topically for various health and wellness purposes.
